generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor of the vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearwheel‑cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor phase current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueMeasurementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement streamed from the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocityMeasurementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity measurement streamed from the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationMeasurementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration measurement streamed from the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueMeasurementSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocityMeasurementSensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationMeasurementSensor
]

// C10: Data (time‑series)
instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angular position (degrees) streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output shaft angular position (degrees) streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor current I_M (A) measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (Nm) trace calculated by the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (rad/s) trace calculated by the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration (rad/s²) trace calculated by the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerMQTTBroker, EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EnablerMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transporting live sensor streams to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization,
                     ContinuousFrictionIdentification,
                     SimulationMeasurementComparison
]

instance EnablerSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime executing behavioural and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationMeasurementComparison,
                     FrictionModelParameterGeneration
]

instance EnablerDashboardApp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing real‑time data and model comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardVisualization
]

instance EnablerAASIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integration for model exchange and parameter injection"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelParameterGeneration
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of current, torque, angular velocity and friction estimates"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionDynamicsForMaintenance
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Online identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters in the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionParameterFeedback,
                     ActionUpdateControllerFrictionParameters
]

instance SimulationMeasurementComparison : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured sensor traces with Simulink simulation outputs for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionDynamicsForMaintenance
]

instance FrictionModelParameterGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of updated friction model parameters from identified values"
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionUpdateControllerFrictionParameters,
                     ActionNotifyMaintenanceTeam
]

// C17: Insights
instance InsightFrictionParameterFeedback : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters are fed back to the robot controller to adjust control algorithms"
]

instance InsightFrictionDynamicsForMaintenance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Engineers gain insight into friction dynamics for maintenance decision making"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ActionUpdateControllerFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update the robot controller with new friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActionNotifyMaintenanceTeam : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notify maintenance personnel about abnormal friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram of motor‑gearbox structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerAASIntegration
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionBaselineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction‑less baseline model for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Coulomb‑Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnablerSimulinkEngine
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation where data is ingested and processed as soon as it is published by the robot (streaming via MQTT)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of a Processing component that consumes measured data traces, runs the Simulink simulation models (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) to generate simulated traces, and stores all traces with provenance metadata; the results are displayed in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operative stage – the digital shadow is created and used while the robot is running to monitor and improve its motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Full traceability of each DataPoint to its source and processing model; validation performed by comparing simulated friction‑free and friction‑included outputs with measured reference traces to assess model accuracy and identify friction parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot controller to the digital shadow over MQTT (publish/subscribe messaging)."
]
